SDD Navigator

← Back to dashboard

Requirement

Route /requirements/[id] with `dynamic = "error"` couldn't be rendered statically because it used `revalidate: 0 fetch http://localhost:4010/requirements/FR-SCAN-002 /requirements/[id]`. See more info here: https://nextjs.org/docs/app/building-your-application/rendering/static-and-dynamic#dynamic-rendering
